_comment: Marketplace catalog patch applied by tools/submit-marketplace-pr.sh. target_file is path relative to the cloned alo-labs/claude-plugins repo; entry is appended to the top-level `plugins` array.

entry.description: Generate, review, and annotate polished presentation decks. Four slash skills powered by pptxgenjs + DECK-VDA design review + auto-refine convergence loop.
